description: The NEXTORCH ND30 is our most sought-after tactical tool, delivering professional-grade distraction capabilities without the regulatory constraints of traditional flashbangs.

The NEXTORCH TA30D MAX delivers tactical brilliance without compromise. Powered by a single high-performance 9-core LED and NEXTORCH’s Ultra Thermal Buffer (U.T.B) system, this elite flashlight pushes out 4000 lumens with a beam distance of 450 meters — all while maintaining a comfortable grip temperature.

The NEXTORCH TA30D delivers tactical performance in a compact, duty-ready form. Powered by NEXTORCH’s new Ultra Thermal Buffer (U.T.B) system, this upgraded model outputs 2200 lumens with a 410-meter beam distance—while maintaining a comfortable grip temperature and longer high-mode stability through advanced thermal buffering.
NEXDOT WL25 — a purpose-built tactical weapon light with an integrated green laser for fast, precise target acquisition.

The WL15 is a high-performance tactical weapon light engineered for demanding tactical applications. Producing up to 1,200 lumens with 44,100 candela and a focused beam distance of 420 m, it delivers powerful forward illumination for fast, precise target identification in time-critical situations.

The ARTORCH Compact EDC Tactical Flashlight packs serious performance into a compact, mission-ready form. Delivering a 1600-lumen output with a 300-meter beam, it offers powerful illumination in a refined, palm-sized body.

Ultra-slim tactical EDC running triple flat-top LEDs for 3,500 lumens and a 220 m throw, powered by a built-in 1,400 mAh LiPo cell with concealed USB-C charging. Controlled by dual tail-switches plus a rotary mode selector (Tactical / Duty / Lock); NTOA field-tested and recommended for duty carry.

In critical operations, overwhelming force isn't optional – it's essential. The P81 delivers a commanding 3700 lumens of threat-stopping power with 370 meters of throw, ensuring you control every tactical scenario.

The NEXTORCH ND30B Distraction Device packs professional-grade capabilities into a civilian-friendly platform ideal for training, home security, and emergency signaling. Its powerful 11,000-lumen strobe and 130dB audio output provide effective deterrence and attention-getting capability in a rubberized, easy-to-handle package.

NEXTORCH 20-year excellence, safeguarding your success. To celebrate two decades of trust from the world’s professionals, NEXTORCH proudly presents the TA22 20th anniversary limited edition — a compact yet powerful, special-color tactical flashlight designed for professionals who demand portability, performance, and durability.

The TA22 is a professional-grade tactical penlight delivering unmatched power in a compact platform. This light sets a new benchmark with 850 lumens of tactical illumination, making it an ideal self-defense light for law enforcement professionals and civilians alike.

The NEXTORCH UT61 is a mission-ready helmet light engineered for low-light navigation, tactical signaling, and infrared operations. Equipped with five color light sources — Red, Blue, Green, White, and IR — the UT61 offers 11 lighting modes, including multiple constant-on and strobe options, as well as a red-blue warning flash.

The C61 is a next-generation, ultra-bright flashlight designed for industrial reliability, on-duty readiness, emergency response, and extreme outdoor conditions. Powered by a revolutionary 9-core LED array, the C61 delivers up to 3,500 lumens with pinpoint focus and wide-area versatility.

The new P91 delivers a staggering 5,000 lumens of scene-dominating output with dual-switch tactical control for instant threat assessment and area assessment. Built for law enforcement with a nano-ceramic strike bezel and concealed USB-C charging port that maintains the light's tactical profile.
The NEXTORCH P84 is designed for emergency and duty use. It features integrated red and blue 360° emergency lights, making it an essential tool for signaling and visibility.

The NEXTORCH E51D is a compact, high-performance EDC flashlight delivering 2100 lumens with a beam distance of 275 meters. Designed for everyday carry, outdoor adventures, and emergency situations, it combines powerful illumination with a palm-sized, rugged aluminum body.

The NEXTORCH E52D is a high-output, compact EDC flashlight engineered for professionals and outdoor enthusiasts. Delivering 3700 lumens with a beam reach of 280 meters, it combines long-range projection with wide-angle illumination for full environmental awareness.
The NEXTORCH Dr.K32 Dual Light Source Medical Penlight brings precision illumination to your clinical examinations with its innovative dual-spectrum design.

The NEXTORCH K33 UV Penlight delivers professional-grade ultraviolet detection capability in a discreet pen-sized package. Built for evidence processing and document verification, this 365nm UV light source pushes out an impressive 1300mW of filtered UV power.

The NEXTORCH K30 penlight redefines what EDC illumination can be, delivering an impressive 850-lumen punch in a duty pen. Perfect for report writing, vehicle inspections, or ID checks, this dual-fuel capable light runs on either the included rechargeable Li-ion battery or standard AAA batteries you can grab from any cruiser.

The NEXTORCH TA30W is a powerful EDC flashlight designed for law enforcement and tactical professionals, featuring a 4500K warm white light and a patented one-step variable frequency strobe for effectively disorienting.
MAXIMIZE YOUR VISIBILITY with 360° illumination technology. The UT51C LED safety bracelet delivers ENHANCED VISIBILITY with tri-color output and seven versatile lighting modes.

The NEXTORCH P21 shield light delivers the illumination superiority you need on patrol. Building on the field-proven P20 platform, this dual-head tactical illuminator pumps out a commanding 3000 lumens to dominate riot control operations.

The P82C tactical illuminator delivers an unprecedented 2200 lumens with a staggering 1100-meter throw - letting you see at distances other lights can't touch. Purpose-built for extended perimeter checks and rural patrol, this duty-rated powerhouse features dedicated side-switches for instant strobe deployment and mode selection.

The NEXTORCH myStar R headlamp is a versatile, hands-free lighting solution designed for outdoor activities. It features dual power supply options, patented Fresnel lens focusing technology, and multi-angle lighting. With an ergonomic design and IPX4 waterproof rating, it ensures comfort and reliability in various conditions.

The NEXTORCH myStar V2 is a multi-purpose, hands-free headlamp designed to meet a variety of lighting needs. Featuring patented Fresnel Lens Focusing Technology, dual light modes, and a comfortable Y-Type headband, it offers exceptional performance with up to 760 lumens and a 220-meter beam distance.

The NEXTORCH UT30 is a versatile and lightweight flashlight designed for hands-free use during outdoor activities and exploration. With compatibility for multiple accessories and gesture sensing, it offers a range of functionalities for a variety of applications.

Developed from the NEXTORCH WL50IR, the WL50 is a compact and versatile tactical flashlight designed for seamless integration with Picatinny rail systems. Its toolless mounting capability ensures quick and secure attachment to various firearms and tactical gear.

The NEXTORCH ND20 delivers professional-grade distraction capabilities with 8000 lumens of intense strobe combined with 100dB sound output. This rechargeable system provides tactical teams a reliable alternative to traditional flashbangs for both training and field operations where conventional distraction devices aren't practical.
The NEXTORCH TA31 is a powerhouse in tactical lighting. This searchlight is designed to meet the demands of high-stakes operations, offering a colossal 10,000-lumen output and a throw of 380 meters.

Command presence meets emergency readiness in our most versatile patrol platform. The P86 delivers 1600 lumens of target-identifying power plus a 120dB whistle for instant traffic control and emergency signaling. Purpose-built for patrol operations with dedicated strobe activation modes.

INSTANT EMERGENCY VISIBILITY when seconds count. The UT51 tactical safety bracelet delivers RAPID DEPLOYMENT with dual-color illumination and 360° visibility. This field-proven safety device features a COMBAT-READY slap-bracelet design for instant attachment during roadside emergencies, traffic control, or critical incidents.

The Saint Torch 30C brings advanced illumination capability to search operations with its formidable 10,000-lumen standard output and 15,000-lumen turbo mode. This compact powerhouse delivers a 515-meter throw with six tactical modes including S.O.S. for emergency signaling.

The NEXTORCH rStar is an advanced multi-light source tactical helmet light, designed to enhance visibility and identification in the field. It features a 4-color main light source, including white, red, green, and IR light, with an 80-lumen high white light mode that projects up to 10 meters.

The NEXTORCH K3V2 is ideally sized for everyday carry. This flashlight is tailored for a range of applications, from casual use to emergency medical situations, offering 4 lighting modes: low, medium, high, and stribe. The K3V2's memory function is a standout feature, retaining the last used mode for quick access.
The NEXTORCH UT41 is a professional-grade multi-color safety beacon that combines five distinct signal sources in one compact, tactical package.

The NEXTORCH K40 is a versatile everyday light that delivers 300 lumens of illumination in a keychain-sized package. Perfect for EDC, dog walking, or department-wide gifting, this multi-function light features three white light levels plus red and blue safety modes ideal for visibility during evening activities.

The NEXTORCH E52C delivers professional-grade illumination in an everyday carry platform, combining an impressive 3000-lumen output with practical 210-meter throw capability. This versatile illuminator provides four output modes to handle everything from close-range tasks to extended area searches.

A 3,000-lumen One-Step-Strobe tactical light: a dedicated tail switch fires strobe instantly from any mode. Runs on a single 21700 with USB-C charging and a nano-ceramic strike bezel, in a duty-ready Tactical/Duty UI.

The NEXTORCH P20 4K Focusable Shield Light is a tactical lighting option optimized for mounting on ballistic shields, providing a blinding 4000 lumen output. It features four light heads with individual focusable beams, a remote switch with a strobe function, and various mounting options for different tactical uses.

Field-proven performance in our most popular tactical light platform. The TA30C delivers a mission-ready 1600 lumens with 303 meters of throw in a field-tested design. Purpose-built for law enforcement with our exclusive One-Step-Strobe switch and rotating magnetic tailcap for instant one-handed activation.

The NEXTORCH iStar is an advanced, rechargeable multifunction smart headlamp that combines white and red LED options with a powerful 450-lumen output. The iStar features an innovative flip-up design, which not only powers the flashlight on and off but also allows for gradual dimming between 450 to 20 lumens.

The C2 UV Compact Ultraviolet Flashlight is a versatile tool designed for detecting invisible stains with its 405nm UV light, making it ideal for applications from identifying pet urine stains on carpets to authenticating currencies and official documents.

Entry-level performance that punches above its weight class. The WL14 delivers 500 lumens of target-identifying power in our most compact CCW platform. Perfect for backup guns, off-duty carry, or academy cadets learning weapon light fundamentals. Features ambidextrous controls, memory mode, and USB-C charging convenience.

The NEXTORCH WL23 delivers overwhelming illumination capability with its 1300-lumen output, available with either red or green laser configurations to match your duty needs. This compact unit provides the extended 180-meter throw needed for positive subject identification.

The NEXTORCH WL13 is a powerful weapon-mounted light designed for tactical applications, featuring a 1,300-lumen output and 180-meter beam distance. It offers an ambidextrous rocker switch for versatile operation, quick-attach mounting system, and compatibility with optional remote switches for long guns.

The NEXTORCH oStar takes helmet-mounted lighting to the next level, delivering a versatile dual-role system. With 500 lumens of focused output and a 131-meter throw, this modular light system ensures you've got reliable illumination whether you're running scenes or working an operation.

The GLO-TOOB™ - AAA Aurora Signal Light is a multi-functional and versatile signal light designed for various high-intensity applications like diving, caving and tactical use. It integrates three distinct light sources (red, blue, green) with seven operational modes, offering flexibility to suit different environmental needs.

The GLO-TOOB GT-AAA IR Tactical Signal Light delivers covert signature management capability in a maritime-ready, mission-critical package. Purpose-built for land use, and amphibious operations, this 850nm IR LED beacon provides distinct infrared illumination visible only through night vision devices.

The NEXTORCH UL10 is a versatile 70-lumen clip light designed for various applications. Featuring three high-performance LEDs, a multi-purpose clip mount, and 180-degree adjustability, it's ideal for attaching to caps, pockets, straps, and MOLLE webbing.

The NEXTORCH UL12 is a clip-on light that puts hands-free illumination exactly where you need it. This compact multi-LED system delivers white, red, and blue lighting options with a 180° pivoting head, ensuring you've got the right light for any situation - from reading maps to emergency signaling.

The NEXTORCH UT31 is a compact and versatile emergency warning clip light, offering hands-free white light illumination alongside high-visibility colored safety light options. This safety light delivers 220 lumens of hands-free white light plus red/blue emergency signals for instant scene marking and traffic control.

The MAX STAR LED Headlamp is a game-changer in outdoor and professional lighting. The headlamp features a unique 360° rotational magnetic dial switch with three lighting modes perfect for a host of outdoor activities such as rail maintenance, emergency rescue, and night fishing.

The WL30 3-in-1 Multi Tactical Light delivers the versatility needed for modern patrol operations, combining a powerful 400-lumen white light with precision green and IR laser capabilities. Purpose-built for law enforcement, this compact unit excels during traffic stops, building searches, and high-risk vehicle approaches.
Mission-ready dual-spectrum illumination for professional operators. The WL50IR weapon light delivers 860 lumens, while the WL50B IR delivers 1,000 lumens of white light output.

The NEXTORCH K3RT stands as a testament to compact power and tactical functionality. With its small pen-like stature, it has a maximum output of 330 lumens and an extensive 11-hour runtime. The K3RT is not just about illumination; it's a tool for security and emergency situations.

Professional-grade illumination in our most trusted duty light platform. The WL11 delivers 650 lumens of threat-stopping white light with 130 meters of throw. Purpose-built for patrol operations, building searches, and high-risk vehicle stops.

The NEXTORCH WL21 delivers patrol-ready versatility with a mission-critical 650-lumen output and customizable laser configurations to match your department's needs. Available with red laser, green laser, or full IR capability for specialized units, this compact unit excels in traffic enforcement and tactical scenarios.

The Dr. K3S is designed for healthcare professionals who need reliable, high-precision lighting. With a choice between two variants, White (5000K) and Yellow (3000K), this compact tool is ideal for various examination settings.

The NEXTORCH WL22 is a dual function compact gun light with a 650 lumen high-intensity white light with a choice of a red or green 5mW laser. Its patented mounting system ensures a quick and secure attachment to Picatinny and Glock rails.
The WL60 brings patrol-grade power to your primary weapon, combining a penetrating 700-lumen output with an integrated green laser for superior target acquisition during daylight operations.

This handy flashlight is particularly useful in the house, workshop, car or when traveling: it is very robust, pleasantly easy to use, and is guaranteed to always provide enough light. The C1's maximum beam range is a real 86 meters.

The NEXTORCH C2 delivers in a proven AA platform, combining a practical 250-lumen output with 120-meter throw capability. Perfect for everyday carry or as a backup light option, this compact unit runs on readily available AA batteries – both alkaline and rechargeable Ni-MH compatible.

The P80 side-switch tactical light brings the authority of 2100 lumens to the job. Field-tested and officer-approved, this duty-rated illuminator features an aggressive strike bezel and delivers a commanding 380-meter throw.

The P8 delivers patrol-optimized performance with its 1600-lumen output and 252-meter throw – ideal for building searches, traffic stops, and urban patrol environments. Purpose-built for law enforcement, this compact unit features an intuitive side-switch interface with instant access to four tactical modes, including strobe.

This tactical flashlight is ideal for long-range applications with a 1200 lumen output and a throw of up to 1100 meters, making it suitable for outdoor explorers and professionals. It offers four white light modes, ranging from high to low and a strobe function for signaling or disorienting.

When you're running traffic stops or clearing buildings, the P10 right-angle flashlight brings the versatility you need for real-world patrol ops. This compact powerhouse rides on your vest exactly where you need it, delivering 1400 lumens of instant illumination without compromising your draw stroke or gear access.
Versatile tactical flashlight with one-step strobe, rotating magnetic tail cap, and Vari-Source battery design. The TA15 V2.0 is perfect for outdoor or law enforcement use.

The T10L redefines patrol illumination capabilities with its cutting-edge Laser Excited Phosphor (LEP) technology, delivering an industry-leading 1400-meter beam reach – nearly a mile of pure target identification power.
The Saint Torch 31 revolutionizes portable illumination with its massive 20,000-lumen output – enough to transform night into day across an entire sports field or campsite.
The NEXTORCH TA21 IR is a compact, high-performance tactical flashlight designed for the everyday use of law enforcement professionals and tactical operators.

Built for precision. Engineered for reliability.
The NEXTORCH eStar is a professional-grade dual-light headlamp designed for real-world work environments — from industrial maintenance and emergency response to night trekking and field operations.
